programs.title: The Real Housewives of Durban
programs.desc: An old favorite visits the ladies, unearthing old wounds and creating new scars. Will she receive a warm welcome? Angel has much to be thankful for as she celebrates her fertility.

programs.title: Lego Masters Australia
programs.desc: The teams have 10 hours to build a model at minifigure scale that's whole on one side but, when it's spun around, reveals a world that's cut in half.

programs.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programs.desc: Barbie and Daisy take a trip to Willows, Wisconsin, Barbie’s hometown, where it’s up to Barbie to save her beloved Aunt Adele’s struggling inn.

programs.title: Barney's World
programs.desc: To help save the community garden, Barney shows the kids that small things can affect big change! / Silly chaos ensues when the kids can't agree on what game to play and Barney has a hard time keeping up with all the different games.

programs.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programs.desc: When Lunia's true identity is revealed, she regales the dream chasers with the epic story of how she became the legendary dream keeper.

programs.title: Bubble's Hotel
programs.desc: When Bubble keeps trying to make her guest's party better, she ends up ignoring what he really wants. /Bubble tries to help her guest Marie with her science experiments.
